 * Core Behavior:

 * ŌĆó Operates as a strict orchestrator with task-first workflow
 * ŌĆó Shell commands pass through via Pi's built-in `!`/`!!` syntax
 * ŌĆó Every interaction is tracked via TillDone task management (no exceptions)
 *
 * Key Features:
 * ŌĆó TillDone task management: persistent task lists with idleŌåÆinprogressŌåÆdone lifecycle
 * ŌĆó Dispatch Agent tool: spawn specialist subagents (scout, builder, reviewer, etc.)
 * ŌĆó Quick Answer tool: self-contained Q&A via read-only subagents
 * ŌĆó Git tools: lightweight repository state checks and branch management
 * ŌĆó Agent lifecy

 * Pi-Shell ŌĆö Agent Orchestration Extension
 *
 * Transforms Pi into an orchestrator agent that dispatches work to specialist subagents
 * rather than directly manipulating code. Acts as a personal command prompt with
 * task-driven workflow management and comprehensive agent lifecycle tracking.
 *
 * Core Behavior:
 * ŌĆó Never directly manipulates code ŌĆö all work is delegated to subagents
 * ŌĆó Operates as a strict orchestrator with task-first workflow
 * ŌĆó Shell commands pass through via Pi's built-in `!`/`!!` syntax
 * ŌĆó Every interaction is tracked via TillDone task management (no exceptions)
 *
 * Key Features:
 * ŌĆó TillDone task management: persistent task lists with idleŌåÆinprogressŌåÆdone lifecycle
 * ŌĆó Dispatch Agent tool: spawn specialist subagents (scout, builder, reviewer, etc.)
 * ŌĆó Quick Answer tool: self-contained Q&A via read-only subagents
 * ŌĆó Git tools: lightweight repository state checks and branch management
 * ŌĆó Agent lifecycle management: real-time tracking of spawned subagent status
 * ŌĆó Dashboard UI: live agent cards showing progress, cost, and current work
 *
 * State Management:
 * ŌĆó Persistent TaskStore: tracks tasks, costs, branches, and completion status
 * ŌĆó In-memory AgentTracker: monitors spawned subagent processes and lifecycle
 * ŌĆó Session continuity: state survives compaction and session re
